steps.title: Identify the like terms
steps.content: The terms $8yz^4$ and $7yz^4$ are like terms because they have the same variable part. The term $5yz$ is not like them because it has $z^1$ instead of $z^4$.

steps.title: Add only matching terms
steps.content:
Combine the coefficients of the like terms and leave $5yz$ separate.
$$8yz^4+7yz^4=15yz^4$$
So the expression becomes
$$15yz^4+5yz$$

steps.title: Match the expression
steps.content: The simplified expression matches choice A. Choices B, C, and D incorrectly combine exponents or unlike terms. The answer is A.
